description: Runs the MINDY algorithm for inferring genes that modulate the activity of a transcription factor at post-transcriptional levels
author: Marc-Danie Nazaire
plan:
## MINDY GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
MINDY is a GenePattern module that Runs the MINDY algorithm for inferring genes that modulate the activity of a transcription factor at post-transcriptional levels

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 11 parameters:
- Required: input.file, modulator.list, transcription.factor, conditional.mi.threshold, conditional.mi.p.value, dpi.tolerance, unconditional.mi.threshold, unconditional.mi.p.value, output.file
- Optional: dpi.transcription.factor.list, sample.percentage

### 3. Command Line
```
<java> <java_flags> -cp <libdir>mindy-gp.jar<path.separator><libdir>jargs.jar<path.separator><libdir>gp-modules.jar<path.separator><libdir>jama-1.0.1.jar<path.separator><libdir>trove.jar<path.separator><libdir>aracne-0.1.jar<path.separator><libdir>workbook-0.91.jar<path.separator><libdir>commons-cli.jar<path.separator><libdir>commons-math-1.0.jar<path.separator><libdir>log4j-1.2.8.jar<path.separator><libdir>collections-generic-4.0.jar<path.separator><libdir>swingx-2006_10_27.jar<path.separator><libdir>commons-logging.jar<path.separator><libdir>mindy-0.2.jar org.genepattern.modules.mindy.MINDY -i <input.file> -c <modulator.list> -h <transcription.factor> -s <sample.percentage>  -m <conditional.mi.threshold> -p <conditional.mi.p.value> -d <dpi.tolerance> -t <unconditional.mi.threshold> -n <unconditional.mi.p.value> -o <output.file>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: 

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: modulator.list
parameters.description: A list of possible modulator genes to analyze - .txt

parameters.name: dpi.transcription.factor.list
parameters.description: List of transcription factors in dataset - .txt

parameters.name: sample.percentage
parameters.description: Percentage of samples to use in analysis (must be <\=50)

parameters.name: conditional.mi.threshold
parameters.description: Conditional mutual information (MI) score threshold (number between 0 and 1)

parameters.name: conditional.mi.p.value
parameters.description: Conditional mutual info p-value threshold (ignored if conditonal MI threshold >0)

parameters.name: dpi.tolerance
parameters.description: The data processing inequality tolerance (number between 0 and 1)

parameters.name: unconditional.mi.threshold
parameters.description: Unconditional mutual information (MI) score threshold (number between 0 and 1)

parameters.name: unconditional.mi.p.value
parameters.description: Unconditional mutual information p-value threshold (ignored if unconditonal MI threshold >0)
